heading: Limitations
body:
You can't perform the following actions:

- Export [fallback snapshots](cps-fallback-snapshots).

- Have more than one active export per snapshot.

- Export [view collections](manual/core/views), or
  [system collections](manual/reference/system-collections),
  with the exception of `<database>.system.js` collections.

- Export snapshots from clusters in an Atlas project
  with IP-restricted [Encryption at Rest using Customer Key Management](security-kms-encryption) enabled.

- Export snapshots from clusters hosted on Azure (Microsoft Azure) or Google Cloud Storage
  in projects configured for
  [Private Endpoint](atlas-configure-private-endpoint).
